title: [BUG] throws error when map is provided in CSV reader and headers = true.
author: dhruvv90

comments.author: dan-boehm
comments.body:
It appears this happens even without the map function.  All you need is `{ parserOptions: { headers: true } }`.

This is because when headers is true, it will return each row as an Object, which doesn't have a map function.

comments.author: dhruvv90
comments.body: @cpprookie - In review, will get back soon.
